title: Include the task name in an assigned email notification
excerpt: The automated email notification does not display which item (topic). The result is the recipient must then click to See Item back in Monday. If the item name was included in the notification, the recipient can recognize…

posts.author: rwitmer1 (Rich Witmer)
posts.cookedHtml:
The automated email notification does not display which item (topic). The result is the recipient must then click to See Item back in Monday. If the item name was included in the notification, the recipient can recognize the task immediately.

Screenshot notification email895×620 25.8 KB
